name: Bead of Force
description:
This small black sphere measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs an ounce. Typically, {@dice 1d4 + 4} Beads of Force are found together.
You can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to throw the bead up to 60 feet. The bead explodes in a 10-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} on impact and is destroyed. Each creature in the {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} must succeed on a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw or take {@damage 5d4} Force damage. A sphe
